title: The GMP Document Control Lifecycle
alt: Five-stage lifecycle of a controlled GMP document from authoring to archiving

items.label: Author & review
items.desc: Drafted by a competent author, reviewed by affected functions

items.label: Approve
items.desc: Authorised signatories sign off; QA approves GMP-critical docs

items.label: Issue & distribute
items.desc: Only current version at point of use; obsolete copies withdrawn

items.label: Change control
items.desc: Formal change with impact, training and regulatory assessment

items.label: Periodic review
items.desc: Risk-based review cycle confirms procedures still match practice

items.label: Retire & archive
items.desc: Removed from use but retained for the required period
